dataList.name: HP彈
dataList.desc:
<color=#7C5738>回合開始</color>時，使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>恢復<color=#61DA61>体力</color>上限3%的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>
若現存<color=#61DA61>体力</color>低于50%，則使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>額外恢復<color=#61DA61>体力</color>上限5%的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>

dataList.name: 過載HP彈
dataList.desc: <color=#7C5738>回合開始</color>時，使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得2層[AttackDmgUp]并対<color=#ffffff>自身</color>施加2層[Vulnerable]

dataList.name: 注射HP安瓶
dataList.desc: <color=#7C5738>回合開始</color>時，若<color=#ffffff>自身</color><color=#61DA61>体力</color>未満，則使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>恢復<color=#61DA61>体力</color>上限25%的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>(最多3次)

dataList.name: HP彈
dataList.desc:
<color=#7C5738>回合開始</color>時，使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>恢復<color=#61DA61>体力</color>上限3%的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>
若現存<color=#61DA61>体力</color>低于50%，則使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>額外恢復<color=#61DA61>体力</color>上限5%的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>

dataList.name: 探戈醤料
dataList.desc:
若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>高于<color=#ffffff>目標</color>，則使<color=#ffffff>拼点威力</color>+(与<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>之差/50)(最多+3)
若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>通過該效果獲得<color=#ffffff>拼点威力</color>，則攻撃結束后対<color=#ffffff>自身</color>施加1層[Vulnerable]

dataList.name: HP彈
dataList.desc:
<color=#7C5738>回合開始</color>時，使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>恢復<color=#61DA61>体力</color>上限3%的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>
若現存<color=#61DA61>体力</color>低于50%，則使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>額外恢復<color=#61DA61>体力</color>上限5%的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>

dataList.name: 流淌的憂郁
dataList.desc: 反面命中時，使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加3級[Sinking]強度

dataList.name: 満溢而出的哀傷
dataList.desc: <color=#7C5738>回合結束</color>時，使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>失去5点<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>

dataList.name: 注射恢復安瓶
dataList.desc: <color=#7C5738>回合開始</color>時，使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>恢復<color=#61DA61>体力</color>上限5%的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>

dataList.name: 過載HP彈
dataList.desc: <color=#7C5738>回合開始</color>時，使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得2層[AttackDmgUp]并対<color=#ffffff>自身</color>施加2層[Vulnerable]

dataList.name: 緊急注射安瓶
dataList.desc: <color=#61DA61>体力</color>低于25%時，使<color=#ffffff>自身</color><color=#61DA61>体力</color>恢復至<color=#61DA61>体力</color>上限的40%(最多1次)
